'''tangulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelalumite|nickelalumite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelalumite|nickelalumite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tangulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængilith|tængilith]] || [[word:tængilij|tængilij]] || [[word:tængilish|tængilish]] || [[word:tængili|tængili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangunguluth|tangunguluth]] || [[word:tangunguluj|tangunguluj]] || [[word:tangungulush|tangungulush]] || [[word:tangungulu|tangungulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanguluth|tanguluth]] || [[word:tanguluj|tanguluj]] || [[word:tangulush|tangulush]] || [[word:tangulu|tangulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tangufluth|tangufluth]] || [[word:tangufluj|tangufluj]] || [[word:tanguflush|tanguflush]] || [[word:tangufluf|tangufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanguluthu|tanguluthu]] || [[word:tanguluju|tanguluju]] || [[word:tangulushu|tangulushu]] || [[word:tanguluku|tanguluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanguluth|tanguluth]] || [[word:tanguluj|tanguluj]] || [[word:tangulush|tangulush]] || [[word:tangulu|tangulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanguluthul|tanguluthul]] || [[word:tangulujul|tangulujul]] || [[word:tangulushul|tangulushul]] || [[word:tangulukul|tangulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanguluthuthu|tanguluthuthu]] || [[word:tangulujuju|tangulujuju]] || [[word:tangulushushu|tangulushushu]] || [[word:tanguluku|tanguluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanguluthun|tanguluthun]] || [[word:tangulujun|tangulujun]] || [[word:tangulushun|tangulushun]] || [[word:tangulukun|tangulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanguluthuoro|tanguluthuoro]] || [[word:tangulujuoro|tangulujuoro]] || [[word:tangulushuoro|tangulushuoro]] || [[word:tangulukuoro|tangulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
